name: Happier
description: Happier is a self-hostable UI/CLI stack for monitoring and interacting with Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini sessions from a web UI and mobile.

notes.text: The Happier web UI requires HTTPS for remote access (secure context). Use Tailscale Serve or your reverse proxy.

By default, this script installs Happier via the official CLI installer plus `happier relay host install` (recommended). For from-source installs, set HAPPIER_PVE_INSTALL_METHOD=from_source (uses `npx @happier-dev/stack hstack setup-from-source`).

Optional: choose release channel by setting HAPPIER_PVE_CHANNEL=stable|preview|dev. Advanced from-source installs can override the bootstrap package via HAPPIER_PVE_STACK_PACKAGE='@happier-dev/stack@<tag-or-version>'.

Default local relay port is 3005 and can be overridden with HAPPIER_PVE_SERVER_PORT. Preview/dev installer-mode configs use channel-specific paths such as /etc/happier-preview/server.env and /etc/happier-dev/server.env.
